description: This watch from puma comes in a heavy duty design. The stylish dial and chunky casing gives this watch a tough appearance - perfect for navigating the urban jungle.Case diameter: 34 mmDial shape: RectangleWarranty: 2 YearsStainless steel case with a fixed bezelLeather straps with a tang claspBlack dial with the jumping cat logo at the 5 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability
